home.title: Welcome
home.tagline: The AI assistant that answers your customers on WhatsApp, books appointments, and sends reminders, around the clock.
home.comingSoon: The full dashboard arrives in the next milestone: connect your WhatsApp, add your business info, and watch the AI reply to customers.

auth.loginSubtitle: Pick up where you left off.
auth.signupSubtitle: One minute of setup, then your AI assistant gets to work.
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.

onboarding.profileSubtitle: This is what the AI uses to speak for your business.
onboarding.verticalHint: For example: salon, clinic, spa, tutor, garage.
onboarding.loadError: Could not load your business info. Refresh the page to try again.
onboarding.saveError: Could not save. Check your connection and try again.

connect.title: Connect your WhatsApp
connect.subtitle: Scan the code with the phone that has your business WhatsApp.
connect.step2: Tap Menu (or Settings), then Linked devices, then Link a device.
connect.step3: Point your phone at this code.
connect.connectedHint: Your WhatsApp is live. Customers who message you will now appear in your Inbox.
connect.startError: Could not start the connection. Try again in a moment.
connect.banRiskDisclosure: Honest note: this starter connection uses an unofficial WhatsApp link. It is affordable and quick, but WhatsApp may restrict numbers that send too much too fast. We pace your messages automatically to protect you. An official upgrade path is coming.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.emptyHint: Share your WhatsApp number with a customer to see them here.
inbox.loadError: Could not load conversations. Check your connection.

thread.sendError: Your reply did not go out. Try again.
thread.loadError: Could not load this conversation. Check your connection.
